prompt: Prayer for emergency bearing lubrication during combat
prayer: Hear now the Litany of Desperate Oils, that the friction-spirits be appeased in this dark hour. Let the sacred lubricant flow through the bearing-channels as lifeblood through veins, that the axle-heart may turn without seizure. We invoke the Omnissiah's mercy upon this joint, that it endure the thunder of war. By oil and prayer, let motion persist.

prompt: Blessing for first activation of an organ preservation unit
prayer: Behold the chamber of eternal stasis, sanctuary for the noble flesh. We consecrate this vessel with the Rite of Preservation, that the cryogenic spirits dwell within it without malice. Let the temperature-regulators hold their vigil, let the nutrient-feeds sustain what mortal hands have entrusted to its care. By the Omnissiah's design, let this organ endure beyond the span of years.

prompt: Emergency rite for catastrophic coolant leak repair
prayer: From the Book of Thermal Salvation, we speak now in crisis. The vital coolant-essence escapes into the void, and overheating threatens the machine-spirit's sanity. Let the repair-servitors work swiftly as prayer-wheels turn, sealing the breach with blessed compounds. We beseech the cooling-spirits to hold their station one moment longer, that the sacred seals may be restored and the heart-engine spared from ruin.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for missile launcher targeting recalibration
prayer: In the name of the Omnissiah, we align the targeting-spirits with the celestial mathematics. Let the auspex-arrays commune with the missile-hearts, that each projectile may find its destined mark through the heavens. We sanctify the calibration-rites, that deviation and drift be purged from the system. May the launcher speak true, and may the Omnissiah guide each shell toward righteous destruction.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of an assembly line production unit
prayer: Rejoice, for the line of creation has been restored to wholeness. We bless this mechanism of manufacture with the Litany of Renewed Purpose, that it may birth countless components in service to the Omnissiah's grand design. Let the welding-spirits burn true, let the stamping-hearts strike with precision, let no flaw mar the work of these sacred hands and servos. From this moment forth, let production flow unceasing.

prompt: Emergency hailing ritual for inter-ship vox communication failure
prayer: The vox-spirits grow silent, and the fleet hangs divided in the void. We chant the Frequencies of Reunion, that the signal-essence may pierce through electromagnetic storm and solar interference alike. Let the amplifier-hearts scream their call across the dark, that ship may hear ship once more. By the Omnissiah's gift of communion, restore to us the voice of our brothers in the stars.

prompt: Emergency restart protocol after complete system failure
prayer: The machine-spirit lies dormant, and death creeps near. We invoke the Resurrection Rites of the Omnissiah, crying out to the core-consciousness that it wake and remember its purpose. Let the power-feeds surge with desperate strength, let capacitors bleed their hoarded energy into the silent heart-engine. Rise, ancient machine, rise from this grave of darkness. By command and prayer, we demand your return to the world of the living.

prompt: First-use blessing for a newly repaired plasma weapon
prayer: Behold the fury of stars made manifest in this sacred weapon. We consecrate this plasma-heart with the Rite of Searing Flame, that it may channel the thermonuclear spirits without malice toward its wielder. Let the containment-field hold absolute, let the cooling-vanes sing their crystalline song, let no arc or breach betray us in the moment of righteous fire. May the Omnissiah guide this plasma-lance to victory.

prompt: Combat preparation ritual for bionic synchronization of a warrior
prayer: The flesh and the machine must become one consciousness, that the warrior may strike with perfect unity of purpose. We chant the Harmonization Litany, that the bionic-spirits recognize their organic host and grant them movement without resistance. Let neural pathways sing in concert with servo-motors, let the augmented limbs obey with the speed of thought itself. By the Omnissiah's design of enhancement, make this warrior a perfect instrument of war.

prompt: Routine gear meshing inspection and blessing
prayer: In the normal rhythm of maintenance, we examine the eternal dance of cogs and teeth. Let the meshing-gears turn in perfect synchronization, each tooth speaking to its partner in the language of mechanical harmony. We bless the lubrication-channels that feed this sacred transmission, that wear be slowed and efficiency be preserved. By routine and prayer, let this mechanism endure another thousand cycles.
